full_text:
Yang Qiu 楊秋
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Qiu (楊秋)was born in Anding. Sent by Han Sui to Cao Cao as an envoy of peace. Surrendered when under siege. Yang Qiu was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty.
